mapper.sql: select u.*, r.* from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id
mapper.select: select user_id, username, nickname, person_name, mobile from sys_user where status = 0 order by gmt_create desc

select id, username, nickname, person_name, mobile, group_id from sys_user left join sys_user_role on sys_user.user_id = sys_user_role.user_id where status = 0 and sys_user_role.role_id = 2 order by sys_user.gmt_create desc

SELECT id, username, nickname, group_id, person_name, mobile FROM sys_user LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ON sys_user.user_id = sys_user_role.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role ON sys_user_role.role_id = sys_role.role_id WHERE sys_user.STATUS = 0 AND sys_role.role_key = 'manager'
